cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what Jens Kristensen decided to do when the earthquake struck. The options are (A) read documents, (B) stay under the desk, (C) run out quickly, or (D) catch falling debris. Looking at the passage, it says that he felt a tremor, then four seconds later the earthquake hit. He considered whether to run for the door or hide under his desk.
